business_questions.question: Which hotel type receives the most bookings?
business_questions.answer: City Hotel leads with 53,043 clean bookings.

business_questions.question: What is the overall cancellation rate?
business_questions.answer: The cleaned dataset has an overall cancellation rate of 27.7%.

business_questions.question: Which hotel type has the highest cancellation risk?
business_questions.answer: City Hotel has the higher cancellation rate at 30.2%.

business_questions.question: Which hotel type contributes the most realized revenue?
business_questions.answer: City Hotel contributes the most estimated realized room revenue: 12,112,961 ADR-units.

business_questions.question: Which month has the highest booking demand?
business_questions.answer: August has the highest booking volume with 11,194 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which month has the highest cancellation rate?
business_questions.answer: August has the highest cancellation rate at 32.4%.

business_questions.question: Which year has the highest booking volume?
business_questions.answer: 2016 has the most records with 41,967 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which market segment is the main acquisition source?
business_questions.answer: Online TA is the largest segment with 51,285 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which distribution channel brings the most bookings?
business_questions.answer: TA/TO is the leading distribution channel with 68,651 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which customer type dominates demand?
business_questions.answer: Transient customers dominate with 71,366 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which customer type contributes the most realized revenue?
business_questions.answer: Transient contributes the highest estimated realized revenue: 18,322,571 ADR-units.

business_questions.question: Which country is the strongest source market?
business_questions.answer: PRT is the top country with 26,864 bookings.

business_questions.question: Among top source countries, where is cancellation risk highest?
business_questions.answer: BRA has the highest cancellation rate among the top source countries at 36.5%.

business_questions.question: Do longer lead times relate to cancellation behavior?
business_questions.answer: Canceled bookings have a median lead time of 80.0 days versus 38.0 days for non-canceled bookings.

business_questions.question: Are repeated guests less likely to cancel?
business_questions.answer: Repeated guests cancel at 8.2%, while first-time guests cancel at 28.4%.

business_questions.question: Do special requests indicate stronger booking intent?
business_questions.answer: Bookings with at least one special request cancel at 21.8% compared with 33.5% for bookings with no request.

business_questions.question: Which reserved room type is most common?
business_questions.answer: Room type A is most requested with 56,009 bookings.

business_questions.question: How often do room assignments change, and does it matter?
business_questions.answer: Room type changes occur in 14.6% of bookings. Changed-room bookings cancel at 4.8% versus 31.6% when the room type stays the same.

business_questions.question: Which season is busiest?
business_questions.answer: Summer is the busiest season with 28,903 bookings.

business_questions.question: Which season contributes the most estimated realized revenue?
business_questions.answer: Summer contributes the highest estimated realized revenue: 10,515,668 ADR-units.

business_questions.question: What length of stay is most common?
business_questions.answer: 1-2 nights is the most common stay length category with 32,903 bookings.

business_questions.question: Do families cancel differently from non-family bookings?
business_questions.answer: Family bookings cancel at 34.4%, while non-family bookings cancel at 26.9%.

business_questions.question: Which deposit type has the highest cancellation rate?
business_questions.answer: Non Refund bookings show the highest cancellation rate at 94.7%.
